title: Cinnagrostis micrathera
taxonomy: Cinnagrostis micrathera is a genus of grasses, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Poaceae, subfamily Chloridoideae. Within the Poaceae family, Cinnagrostis micrathera is classified as a genus of the tribe Cynodonteae. The classification of Cinnagrostis micrathera is still under review and may be subject to change as new research emerges. More specifically, some sources classify it as a synonym of Eragrostis, which is also a grass genus. However, its exact classification may require further study and confirmation.
